```scala
@ participant1.ledger_api.users.update("myuser", user => user.copy(isDeactivated = true))
    res18: User = User(
      id = "myuser",
      primaryParty = None,
      isDeactivated = true,
      annotations = Map("description" -> "This is a new description", "baz" -> "bar"),
      identityProviderId = "",
      primaryPartyAuthentication = false
    )
```
